comment: Cosmic Coaster was incredible! Short wait too.
Waited 45 minutes for a table at the reserved restaurant.
Team member went above and beyond helping us find a lost item.
Restrooms near Harbor Gardens could use more frequent cleaning.
Mystic Manor was fun but the line moved slowly.
The Pineapple Swirl was worth every minute in line.
Guest relations was unhelpful with our Front-of-Line Pass issue.
The new charging stations throughout the park are a great addition.
Sea Raiders was closed for maintenance during our visit. Disappointing.
Mobile ordering worked smoothly at Stardust Diner.
Character meet and greet was magical for our kids.
Parking tram was overcrowded and took forever.
Neon Circuit was the highlight of our whole trip.
Food quality was fine but prices are getting out of hand.
Disability access was well-handled and respectful.
